overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character in a green dress walking through a futuristic neon-lit city at dusk. The character descends a long outdoor staircase alongside a busy street, passes through an underpass with vibrant pink neon lighting, and crosses a futuristic intersection with yellow-striped crosswalks.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered glass entrance with neon accents

events.description: exiting covered building interior into glass-enclosed walkway overlooking the city

agents.ego_description: walking through a modern glass entrance with cyan neon trim, heading toward an outdoor staircase overlooking the city

entered.detail: futuristic glass and steel entrance with transparent walls and ceiling
bright cyan neon light strips lining the glass walls and ceiling edges
large red neon sign with Japanese text reading SUSHI ELECTRONICS
highly polished reflective floor mirroring the neon lights above

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a futuristic covered entrance with glass walls and cyan neon lighting. The reflective floor mirrors the vibrant lights as the character approaches the exit overlooking the city.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated pedestrian stairway with city overlook

events.description: transitioning from sheltered interior lighting to open dusk ambiance with natural sky visible
beginning descent down long staircase alongside the busy street below

agents.ego_description: walking down stairs alongside a busy street, overlooking the city traffic and neon-lit buildings below

notable_agents.action: man in red beret and yellow shirt walking up the stairs in the opposite direction

entered.detail: transparent glass safety railing along the edge of the staircase
multi-lane city street with moving traffic visible several stories below
large digital billboard displaying advertisements with bright neon colors
tall palm trees lining the edge of the pedestrian walkway

segments.scene_description: The character descends an open-air staircase with glass railings, overlooking a busy city street below. The lighting shifts to natural dusk as a pedestrian in a red beret passes by walking uphill. Neon billboards and palm trees line the right side of the walkway.

scene_state.functional_zone: lower pedestrian underpass with pink neon lighting

events.description: ambient lighting shifts to dominant magenta and pink neon as character descends under building overhang
reaching bottom of stairs entering plaza area with vending machines and large digital displays

agents.ego_description: continuing down stairs as lighting shifts to vibrant pink neon, approaching vending machines at the bottom of the descent

entered.detail: overhead structure with intense pink and magenta neon lighting creating a color wash effect
futuristic vending machines with glowing yellow advertisements at the bottom of the stairs
tall vertical digital screens displaying animated advertisements

segments.scene_description: The character descends further under a building overhang where the lighting shifts dramatically to vibrant pink and magenta neon. The character reaches the bottom of the stairs where futuristic vending machines and large digital billboards become visible.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban plaza with crosswalk and digital advertisements

events.description: turning right and walking toward the yellow-striped crosswalk
stepping onto futuristic yellow-striped crosswalk to cross the wide intersection

agents.ego_description: walking past vending machines and crossing a futuristic intersection with bold yellow striped crosswalk markings

entered.detail: wide pedestrian crosswalk with bold yellow diagonal stripes on dark asphalt
tall skyscrapers with glass facades and extensive neon signage lining the street

segments.scene_description: The character walks through an open plaza past glowing vending machines, then turns toward a wide intersection. The character steps onto a futuristic crosswalk marked with bold yellow stripes, surrounded by towering glass buildings covered in neon advertisements.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a sterile, neon-lit interior out into the vibrant, sprawling chaos of a futuristic city at dusk. It begins within a covered entrance of glass walls and cyan lighting, where the reflective floor mirrors the glow as the character moves toward the exit. As the character emerges, the scene shifts to an open-air staircase overlooking a busy street, with the lighting transitioning to natural twilight amidst palm trees and glowing billboards. The camera then descends further under a building overhang, where the atmosphere transforms into a wash of vibrant pink and magenta neon before reaching the street level. Finally, the movement opens into a wide plaza past glowing vending machines, leading the character across a yellow-striped crosswalk surrounded by towering glass skyscrapers and massive digital advertisements.
